texto: Besides Mass, Energy, Life, and of course Love, there is one thing constant, and does not change with millennia - and that is ‘Wisdom’.
explicacao: Citação de Sandeep Sahajpal sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Besides Mass, Energy, Life, and of course Love, there is one thing constant, and does not change …” articula reflexao, inspirational-quotes-about-life, besides em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e inspiracao.
